‹ GalNet Chronicle
Entity Profile
P

Carter Armstrong

Person · First seen 3304-06-01 · 10 mentions
Active: 3304-06-01 → 3308-10-03
Mentions Timeline (10 articles)
3308-10-03
Making the Case for Aegis
A three-day symposium has begun that will outline proposals to reform Aegis, the tri-superpower anti-xeno agency.
3308-03-02
Aegis Demands Reinstatement
Aegis leaders petition the superpowers for reinstatement amid evidence of Azimuth's return.
3308-01-31
‘Azimuth has Survived’ Warns Aegis
Data from the Alexandria reveals Azimuth Biochemicals orchestrated the megaship's destruction.
3307-09-14
Salvation Warns of Thargoid Strike
The anonymous figure Salvation claims Thargoid forces will attack the Cornsar system, but Aegis dismisses the warning due to lack of evidence.
3304-06-24
Week in Review
Weekly summary covering Thargoids being repelled from core systems to Bhal, three starports restored to full functionality, Aisling Duval's engagement to Jordan Rochester, the foiled League of Reparation assassination attempt on Dinah Law, Zachary Rackham's Colonia shipyard donation, Aegis's military installation plans in the Pleiades, and Caspian Leopold's completed refugee centre initiative.
3304-06-22
Starports Recover from Thargoid Strikes
Three starports damaged by Thargoid forces are restored to full functionality. Carter Armstrong of Aegis Core announces Armstrong Enterprise in the Bhal system and Beaufoy Vision in the Nauni system are now open. Senior Engineer Lilith Galloway of Aegis Research confirms Reed's Rest in Merope has also endured thanks to galactic community support.
3304-06-10
Week in Review
Weekly summary covering the murder of INRA descendant Luca Hem by the League of Reparation, Aisling Duval hosting Jordan Rochester and Caspian Leopold's subsequent visit, the Lave Radio Network vs Lave Jet Family rivalry, successful conclusions of two starport repair initiatives, and the theft of the Youscape artwork from Garden City Gallery.
3304-06-08
Starport Repair Initiative Concludes
The Aegis Core campaign to fund refurbishment of starports in the core systems ends successfully. Large quantities of construction materials were delivered to Dantec Enterprise. Chief administrator Carter Armstrong thanks the galactic community and confirms the materials will repair damage caused by Thargoid attacks.
3304-06-03
Week in Review
Weekly summary covering the Socho system being overtaken by the Socho Gold Raiders, Aegis's Eagle Eye success in repelling Thargoids, five ships destroyed by the League of Reparation with the discovery of the 'Nexus' coordinator, two starport repair campaigns in the Pleiades, the Los Chupacabras music festival, and the Autocracy of T'iensei clearing criminals.
3304-06-01
Starport Repair Initiative Announced
Following Thargoid strikes on the fringes of the core systems, Aegis Core announces a new initiative to restore damaged starports. Chief administrator Carter Armstrong appeals to the galactic community to deliver construction materials to Dantec Enterprise in the Socho system. The materials will be shipped to affected starports for repairs.
